heading: Definition of Administrator
label: 8901 Definition of Administrator
text: In this chapter, the term “Administrator” means the Administrator of the Environmental Protection Agency.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title LXXIII of , , , known as the PFAS Act of 2019, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out below and Tables.Pub. L. 116–92, div. F133 Stat. 2275Dec. 20, 2019

Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 116–92, div. F, title LXXIII, § 7301133 Stat. 2275Dec. 20, 2019“This title [enacting this chapter and amending and sections 300j–12 and 11023 of Title 42, The Public Health and Welfare] may be cited as the ‘PFAS Act of 2019’.”section 2607 of this title
